nodes.label: Merge View Screenshot (Dragit UI)
nodes.author: Alejandro De Cicco
nodes.description: UI screenshot of Dragit's branch merge/divergence view. Shows a two-panel layout comparing local 'main' branch (left) against 'origin/main' (right). Left panel displays one local-only commit ('Fix branch history display', hash #7f0a1c7d, marked with red/orange indicator). Right panel shows three remote-only commits ('Improved readme and local builds' #e928cf64, 'Tweak some more interactions' #204a65a6, 'Centralize interaction definitions' #c138f404, all marked with blue indicators). A vertical timeline connects the two panels. Action buttons for push/pull are visible. Dark theme. Window title bar reads 'Dragit'.
